mapper.select:
SELECT SUM(TTQTY) AS TTQTY ,SUM(AVQTY) AS AVQTY ,SUM(ALQTY) AS ALQTY ,SUM(PIQTY) AS PIQTY ,SUM(HOQTY) AS HOQTY ,SUM(TOTAL_WEIGHT) AS TOTAL_WEIGHT ,SUM(AV_WEIGHT) AS AV_WEIGHT FROM (
)

SELECT A.SERIAL_NO, TO_CHAR(FN_GET_BACODE_PARS(C.BRANDKEY , A.SERIAL_NO),'999,999,999,999.99') WEIGHT, C.UOM AS UOM_DESC FROM TWORK_INFO_IVATXLCXULCXBOX A, TADMIN_MST_IC B, TADMIN_MST_ICXBRAND C WHERE A.OWKEY = B.OWKEY AND A.ICKEY = B.ICKEY AND B.BRANDKEY = C.BRANDKEY AND SUBSTR(A.WKSTATUS, 2, 1) = '0' AND A.CTKEY = #{ctkey} AND A.OWKEY = #{owkey} AND A.ULCKEY = #{ulckey} AND A.IVATKEY = #{ivatkey}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO TWORK_MST_ULC ( CTKEY, ULCKEY, ULCTYPE, INSERTDATE, INSERTURKEY, UPDATEDATE, UPDATEURKEY ) VALUES ( #{ctkey}, #{ulckey}, #{ulctype}, #{sysdate}, #{surkey}, #{sysdate}, #{surkey} )
